details.quote: We and third parties that provide content or other functionality on Bluesky may use cookies, pixel tags, and other technologies ("Tracking Technologies") to automatically collect information.
details.what_is_tracked: Information automatically collected via pixel tags and other tracking technologies

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Policy explains what we do with our users’ Personal Data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We are a "data controller" of the Personal Data that we process in connection with the Services. This means that we decide why and how we process Personal Data about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Bluesky has appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO). You may contact our DPO at Ametros Group Ltd, Lakeside Offices, Thorn Business Park, Rotherwas Industrial Estate, Hereford, Herefordshire, HR2 6JT, dpo@ametrosgroup.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Personal Data you provide**- **Account Creation.**We collect information like email address, phone number, images you associate with your profile, birth date and username when you create a Bluesky account.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We process personal information when we have a valid legal basis, including as set forth below: - **Performance of a Contract:**Bluesky may need to process your personal information where required to perform our contract with you, namely the Terms of Service, and for the purposes described in Section 4(A) of this Privacy Notice.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you do not want to provide Personal Data we request, we may not be able to provide you with access to the Bluesky app or to specific features and functions of Bluesky.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We keep the Personal Data we collect for as long as you use the Bluesky App Services, or as necessary to fulfill the purpose(s) for which we collected it.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share Personal Data with our third-party service providers and vendors.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We make reasonable efforts to protect your information by using physical and electronic safeguards designed to improve the security of the information we maintain.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may collect personal information from third parties. For example, you may direct a developer application or other third-party social networking application to share personal information with us

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Third Parties, generally.We may collect personal information from third parties.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If your personal information is subject to the applicable data protection laws of Brazil, the European Economic Area, Switzerland, or the United Kingdom, and you believe our processing of your personal information violates applicable law, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Request Correction**of your personal information where it is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Request Access to and Portability of Your Personal Information,**including: (i) obtaining access to or a copy of your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Request Deletion, Anonymization or Blocking**of personal information including when processing is based on your consent, or when processing is unnecessary, excessive or noncompliant (also known as the "right to be forgotten").

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Request Restriction of or Object to**our processing of your personal information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: (ii) receiving an electronic copy of personal information that you have provided to us, or asking us to send that information to another company in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format (also known as the "right of data portability")

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Request to Opt-Out of Certain Processing Activities**if we engage in certain data processing activities that give you a right of opt-out under applicable privacy laws

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: We are a "data controller" of the Personal Data that we process in connection with the Services.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Tracking Technologies allow a website to recognize your device and can serve several purposes: to ensure that the website takes the user’s preferences into account by storing language preferences, to collect statistical data and adapt the content.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: - **Analytical or Performance Cookies.**We may also use cookies for website analytics purposes in order to operate, maintain and improve our Bluesky App Services.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: - **Strictly Necessary Cookies.**Some cookies are strictly necessary to make our Bluesky App Services available to you.

cookies.label: Distinction fonctionnels / publicitaires
cookies.quote: - **Strictly Necessary Cookies.**Some cookies are strictly necessary to make our Bluesky App Services available to you.

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We may use our own analytics cookies or use third-party analytics providers.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: Where required by applicable law, you will be asked to consent to certain cookies and similar Tracking Technologies before we use or install them on your computer or other device.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: We may transfer, process, and store all personal information we collect anywhere in the world.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: Account Creation. We collect information like email address, phone number, images you associate with your profile, birth date and username when you create a Bluesky account.
identite.purpose: Création et gestion du compte utilisateur, vérification d'identité pour la récupération de compte.

contact.quote: Account Creation. We collect information like email address, phone number, images you associate with your profile, birth date and username when you create a Bluesky account.
contact.purpose: Communication avec l'utilisateur, support et gestion du compte.

compte_auth.quote: username and password; Account Recovery. If you lose control of your account for some reason and need to recover it, we may ask you to provide information that helps us confirm your identity.

paiement.quote: Payment Information. When you make a purchase, a third party service provider that handles payments for us will receive the payment information you provide, including your payment card information.
paiement.purpose: Traitement des transactions financières via des tiers.

localisation.quote: Usage Information. When you use Bluesky, we collect certain information automatically, including your Internet protocol (IP) address (which can be used to derive your general location)
localisation.purpose: Dérivation de la localisation générale via l'adresse IP pour les services.

appareil_technique.quote: Usage Information. When you use Bluesky, we collect certain information automatically, including your Internet protocol (IP) address, user settings, cookie identifiers, mobile carrier, other unique identifiers, browser or device information, and Internet service provider (ISP).
appareil_technique.purpose: Fonctionnement du service, personnalisation et sécurité.

usage_comportement.quote: Usage Information. We may also collect personal information about your use of Bluesky, including the posts you view on Bluesky, the links you click within Bluesky, and the frequency and duration of your activities.
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse de l'engagement et amélioration du service.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: Your Posts. The Bluesky App is a microblogging service that lets you post content and comment on other users' posts. We collect your posts.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Fournir le service de microblogging et interaction publique.

communications.quote: Your Direct Messages. We store and process your direct messages so you can communicate directly with other users on the Bluesky App.
communications.purpose: Permettre les communications privées entre utilisateurs.

donnees_tiers.quote: Third Parties, generally. We may collect personal information from third parties. For example, you may direct a developer application or other third-party social networking application to share personal information with us or you may live in a jurisdiction that requires age verification and we will collect information from a third-party provider telling us whether you meet certain age requirements.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Vérification d'âge et intégration avec des applications tierces.

biometrie.quote: Biometric Information which is described above and which is collected only by third-party providers to the extent necessary to conduct age or identity verification. We do not collect, receive, possess, or have access to this data.

donnees_sensibles.quote: The following Personal Data elements we, or our service providers, collect may be classified as "sensitive" under certain privacy laws ("Sensitive Information") including: username and password; birthday; telephone number; government identifiers (like driver's license numbers); payment information; and confirmation that a user is 18 years old or older.
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Les données sensibles listées ne relèvent pas de l'article 9 du RGPD (ex. santé, opinions politiques).

mineurs.quote: The Bluesky App Services are not directed to children under 13 (or other age as required by local law outside of the United States). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, paiement, appareil_technique, localisation, usage_comportement, contenus_utilisateur, communications
legal_bases.quote: To Provide Our Services. We use personal information to fulfill our contract with you and provide Bluesky and the Services, such as: Managing your account; Providing access to certain areas, functionalities, and features of the Bluesky App Services; Answering support requests; and Communicating with you about your account, activities on the Bluesky App Services, and policy changes.

For Administrative Purposes. We use personal information for various administrative purposes, such as: Pursuing our legitimate interests like direct marketing, research and development (including marketing research), network and information security, and fraud prevention; Detecting security incidents, protecting against malicious, deceptive, fraudulent or illegal activity, and taking appropriate actions against malicious actors; Measuring interest in, and engagement with Bluesky and with Services; Carrying out analytics; Improving, upgrading, or enhancing Bluesky and Services; Developing new products and services.

legal_bases.data: appareil_technique (cookies non strictement nécessaires), donnees_tiers (partage via applications tierces)
legal_bases.quote: With Your Consent. We may use personal information for other purposes that are clearly disclosed to you at the time you provide personal information or with your consent.

For Administrative Purposes. Carrying out activities that are required to comply with our legal obligations; Legal Bases for Processing. Compliance with our Legal Obligations: Bluesky may process your personal information to comply with our legal obligations. For example, we may process your personal information to comply with tax, labor, and accounting obligations.

transfers.quote: International data transfers. We may transfer, process, and store all personal information we collect anywhere in the world. Different countries have different data protection laws. If we transfer personal information from the European Economic Area, Switzerland, Brazil and/or the United Kingdom to a country that does not provide an adequate level of protection under applicable data protection laws, we will do so (i) using appropriate safeguards; (ii) based on safeguards like the European Commission-approved, UK Government-approved, or Brazil’s Data Protection Authority Standard Contractual Clauses or Addenda; or (iii) otherwise in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
